Image: dev-openwrt-25.12.4-rpi5-squashfs-factory.img.gz
LAN address: 192.168.8.1
LuCI: https://192.168.8.1/
SSH user: root
Root password: 1
Wi-Fi AP SSID: Wifi_cua_Phu
Wi-Fi AP password: 16022003
Wi-Fi uplink SSID: Khuynh 2
Wi-Fi uplink password: 888888888
Wi-Fi country: VN

The onboard Wi-Fi starts a 2.4 GHz AP first, then automatically attempts the uplink.
If uplink association fails, AP-only fallback is restored. To change the uplink:
  dev-wifi-uplink '<UPSTREAM_SSID>' '<UPSTREAM_PASSWORD>' 'VN' '2g'

SSH from the AP:
  ssh root@192.168.8.1
SSH from the same upstream network:
  ssh root@dev-rpi5.local
  # or use the DHCP address shown by the upstream router
